title: RHCSA 10 Lab 01: Hostname Resolution
description: Configure persistent hostname and local name resolution

tasks: On server, set the persistent hostname to server10.lab.example.
On client, set the persistent hostname to client10.lab.example.
On client, add a persistent hosts entry mapping server10.lab.example to 192.168.122.3.
hints: Use hostnamectl for the static hostname.
checks: awk '$1 == "192.168.122.3" {for (i = 2; i <= NF; i++) if ($i == "server10.lab.example") found = 1} END {exit !found}' /etc/hosts && getent hosts server10.lab.example | grep -q '192.168.122.3'
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: set the persistent hostname to server10.lab.example
set the persistent hostname to client10.lab.example
add a persistent hosts entry mapping server10.lab.example to 192.168.122
